{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Mad King's fragment
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Waybound (novel)|Waybound]]
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Mad King's fragment]] is a skeletal copy of the original.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18">''Waybound'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
